input_schema.description: Execute JavaScript against payload data. The current row object is automatically available as `row`. Pure extractor globals are injected as `extract(tool, data, selector)` and `extractList(tool, data, selector)`.

fields.name: code
fields.description: JavaScript body only. Return a value.

fields.name: runInSandbox
fields.description: Set true to route execution into the Deepline-managed sandbox for heavier cloud runs. Sandboxed execution is billed by Deepline from allocated wall time.

fields.name: toolMetadata
fields.description: Optional tool metadata registry keyed by tool id so extract/extractList can resolve provider getter paths in plain run_javascript.

sandbox.descriptionSuffix: For cloud workflows and tools execute, set `runInSandbox=true` to route execution into the Deepline-managed sandbox for heavier workloads. The default contract for that sandbox is: standard Node.js runtime only; extra npm libraries are available only if they are baked into the configured sandbox snapshot.
sandbox.defaultSnapshotDependencyContract: Standard Node.js runtime only. Deepline does not guarantee extra npm libraries unless they are baked into the configured sandbox snapshot.
